reviews.review_description: … the sound is delayed, big latency. I love the minimalism and i dont expect to much for 99 cent and i would pay more if i have no latency and a good smooth jam feeling!

developer_response.body: Thank you for your review, smooth no latency coming soon, stay tuned!

reviews.review_description: The app straight up never loaded

developer_response.body: thank you for your feedback, please update and retry

reviews.review_description: It doesn’t vibrate controller and makes me hit note twice

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback! Vibration added and fixed double note, please update your installation and if you could edit review that would be much appreciated
